title: Bushy Round Blossoms
description: Gives spore blossoms a rounder, bushier look with more petals.
body:
# Bushy Round Blossoms

Bushy Round Blossoms is a simple yet elegant resource pack that makes spore blossoms prettier. This pack changes the textures to be rounder and updates the models to include more petals for a fuller, bushier look. It is perfect for players who didn't like the blossom before without straying too far from Minecraft's vanilla aesthetic.
